# Safe dependencies for automated Dependabot review.
# One pattern per line. Supports glob-style wildcards (*).
# Derived from docs/dependency-updates.md -- these are packages where
# passing CI is sufficient evidence that the upgrade is safe.

# --- Python: testing tools ---
pytest
pytest-cov
pytest-django
coverage
model-bakery
responses

# --- Python: linters and formatters ---
ruff
black

# --- Python: type checking ---
mypy
django-stubs
django-stubs-ext
djangorestframework-stubs
types-*

# --- Python: AWS (generated from API definitions, frequent patches) ---
boto3
botocore
mypy-boto3-*

# --- npm: type definitions ---
@types/*

# --- npm: linters and formatters ---
@typescript-eslint/*
eslint*
prettier

# --- npm: testing ---
@testing-library/*
*jest*

# --- npm: git hooks and formatting ---
husky
lint-staged

# --- GitHub Actions ---
actions/*
